name: image-metadata-ai
description: Image Metadata Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: detect_format
tools.description: Detect image format from file path or base64 data.

tools.name: get_dimensions
tools.description: Get width and height of an image file (supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP).

tools.name: read_exif
tools.description: Read EXIF metadata from a JPEG image file.

tools.name: strip_metadata
tools.description: Strip all metadata from an image file for privacy.
